title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 91.
content:
There was a Young Lady of Russia,
    Who screamed so that no one could hush her;
    Her screams were extreme,
    No one heard such a scream,
    As was screamed by that Lady of Russia.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 91."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
